<?php namespace Aws\Api\Parser\Exception; use Aws\HasMonitoringEventsTrait; use Aws\MonitoringEventsInterface; use Aws\ResponseContainerInterface; use Psr\Http\Message\ResponseInterface; class ParserException extends \RuntimeException implements MonitoringEventsInterface, ResponseContainerInterface { use HasMonitoringEventsTrait; private $errorCode; private $requestId; private $response; public function __construct($message = '', $code = 0, $previous = null, array $context = []) { $this->errorCode = isset($context['error_code']) ? $context['error_code'] : null; $this->requestId = isset($context['request_id']) ? $context['request_id'] : null; $this->response = isset($context['response']) ? $context['response'] : null; parent::__construct($message, $code, $previous); } /** * Get the error code, if any. * * @return string|null */ public function getErrorCode() { return $this->errorCode; } /** * Get the request ID, if any. * * @return string|null */ public function getRequestId() { return $this->requestId; } /** * Get the received HTTP response if any. * * @return ResponseInterface|null */ public function getResponse() { return $this->response; } }
